Assessment Correction Version CHAR 2 The number of the assessment. 00 = Original, 01 = First correction, 02 = Second correction, etc.
6 ASTMDND AST_MOD_IND Assessment Modification Indicator CHAR 1 Designates version of the assessment C = Current, M = Modified, X = Inactive
7 CARELOCK CARE_LOCK Care Planning Lock Date DATE 8 Care Planning Lock Date
8 CRTDDT CREATED_DATE Created Date DATE 8 For OASIS and MDS Assessments, it is the date the record submitted was saved to the state database.
